parameters.prompt: One photorealistic wraparound two-crew spacecraft flight console, 4.8 m wide, 1.15 m high, 1.25 m deep. Low central sightline, angled instrument wings, structural pedestal, replaceable display bezels, guarded switches, rotary controls, handholds, ventilation, cable access and service panels. Functional near-future avionics with layered depth and realistic bevels, isolated single object, pilot side faces -Z. No seats, room, floating screens, holograms, fake text, logos, stand, ground, or background.
parameters.texture_prompt: De-lit realistic flight hardware: dark low-glare composite, anodized aluminum bezels, physical black display glass, brushed metal controls, restrained amber and cyan indicator lenses, subtle hand-contact wear, no baked highlights, pseudo-text, logos, random grime, or active emissive content.

strengths: wraparound two-crew console has a clear operator cavity and layered physical controls
large display bezels, work surfaces and service panels are readable from all views
required_cleanup: delete two minor disconnected fragments and protect the central pilot sightline
replace generated controls and screens with stable interaction and display surfaces
verify seated and standing reach envelopes before promotion
